title: [Cesspit]
description: The muck that has filtered through the grate for decades, or perhaps centuries, covers the floor of this watery hollow in the wall of the castle.  The stench is unbearable, and things which you do not particularly wish to identify splash at the surface now and then.  The ancient stone walls are covered with slime, lichens, and crawling things, and it is very hard to breathe in what little air remains.
